---
title: "Teaching materials"
editor: source
---

## Middlebury College

### Spring 2026

[STAT 0219: Time Series Analysis Syllabus](internal_docs/s26_stat219/syllabus.pdf)

[STAT 0711: Statistical Consulting Syllabus](internal_docs/s26_stat711/syllabus.pdf)

### Fall 2025

[STAT 0116: Introduction to Statistical Science Syllabus](internal_docs/f25_stat116/syllabus.pdf)

[STAT 0218: Statistical Learning Syllabus](internal_docs/f25_stat218/syllabus.pdf)

### Spring 2025

[STAT 0116: Introduction to Statistical Science Syllabus](internal_docs/s25_stat116/syllabus.pdf)

[STAT 0311: Statistical Inference Syllabus](internal_docs/s25_stat311/syllabus.pdf)

### Fall 2024

[STAT 0116: Introduction to Statistical Science Syllabus](internal_docs/f24_stat116/syllabus.pdf)

[STAT 0219: Time Series Analysis Syllabus](internal_docs/f24_stat219/syllabus.pdf)

## Montana State University

[STAT 217: Intermediate Statistical Analyses Syllabus](internal_docs/syllabus_stat217/syllabus_stat217.qmd)

## Other resources

[Web application for teaching statistical power](https://christianstratton.shinyapps.io/PowerApp/)

[Web application exploring LRT for normal variance](https://strattonc.shinyapps.io/s2lrt/)

[Web application demonstrating impact of ignoring serial correlation](https://strattonc.shinyapps.io/tsreg/)
